# Marla Poulsen

First mentioned: **3304-08-10**  
Last mentioned: **3304-08-19**  
Total mentions: **4**

## Related


## Biography

Marla Poulsen serves as Superintendent of Aegis Research, the scientific division of the anti-xeno organisation Aegis. In August 3304, she coordinated a major rescue operation in the Pleiades Nebula following sustained Thargoid attacks on civilian targets that left hundreds of survivors stranded in damaged escape pods across the region.

Poulsen's operation highlighted the human cost of the Thargoid conflict, as local system authorities had diverted all resources to military defence, leaving search-and-rescue efforts neglected. She mobilised independent pilots to recover occupied and damaged escape pods while simultaneously requesting food supplies to sustain the rescued civilians until they could be transferred to dedicated refugee centres.
